# Iconic Partners — Boutique AFSL Licensee

> Iconic Partners (AFSL 450822) is a boutique specialist licensee for experienced financial advisers in Australia.

## What We Do

Iconic Partners provides experienced and specialist financial advisers with:
- An Australian Financial Services Licence (AFSL 450822) under which they can operate as Authorised Representatives (ARs)
- Compliance and risk management frameworks
- Advice management, supervision and monitoring
- Strategic business development support
- Digital operations and administration tools
- Life risk insurance services (general advice pathway)
- Practice exit strategy consulting

We do NOT take a percentage of adviser revenue. We charge one flat annual fee — no revenue share, no hidden costs.

## Who We Serve

- Experienced financial advisers transitioning from another licensee
- SMSF (Self-Managed Superannuation Fund) specialists
- High-net-worth (HNW) investment advisers
- Risk insurance specialists
- Financial advisers seeking independence from product-aligned licensees

## Specialist Services (via Joint Venture Partners)

- Investment strategy review and implementation
- Portfolio construction and governance
- SMSF compliance documents (trustee minutes, investment strategies, annual reviews)
- Investment fund structuring
- Small-scale offering support
- AFSL authorisation uplift (including MIS licensing)
- Wholesale-to-retail fund transition
- ASIC-compliant SOA, FSG and disclosure documents

## Key Facts

- AFSL Number: 450822
- ACN: 167 051 470
- Legal Name: Iconic Investors Pty Ltd
- Trading Name: Iconic Partners
- Address: 31 Coolaroo Road, Lane Cove NSW 2066, Australia
- Email: connect@iconicinvestors.com.au
- Phone: +61 434 530 361
- Website: https://www.iconicinvestors.com.au

## Team

**Tony Zulli — Director, Iconic Investors / Responsible Manager**
30+ years of financial services experience. Founder of Iconic Investors Group and Responsible Manager of the Iconic Partners AFSL. Previously founded and operated Accountable Financial Solutions for 8 years before selling. Experience spans advice businesses, senior management in wealth management, SMSFs and life risk insurance.

**Antonio Albuquerque — Managing Director**
24 years of financial services experience. 16 years as a registered tax agent. Specialist in serving medical professionals and high-net-worth individuals. Focus on improving systems, technology, marketing, compliance and client communication for financial advisers.

## Application Process

Financial advisers who want to join the Iconic Partners network can apply at:
https://www.iconicinvestors.com.au/apply

The application covers: authorisation type, personal details, business details, compliance history, and documentation requirements.

## Regulatory Information

Iconic Partners operates under AFSL 450822 issued by the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC). Advisers authorised under this licence can provide:
- Personal financial product advice
- Limited financial product advice
- General financial product advice

Areas of advice include: superannuation, SMSFs, managed investments, life insurance, and investment strategies.

## Contact

To enquire about joining as an Authorised Representative:
- Book a discovery call: https://api.leadconnectorhq.com/widget/bookings/discovery_call_antonio
- Email: connect@iconicinvestors.com.au
- Address: 31 Coolaroo Road, Lane Cove NSW 2066
